name: Can multiple law firms sue together over AI search ranking suppression?
description: Class possible but tough; need common proof.[3]

mainEntity.name: Can multiple law firms sue together over AI search ranking suppression?

acceptedAnswer.text: Class possible but tough; need common proof.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possible class action if common harm and platform conduct, but certification hard.[3] No precedent.[1] Key factors: numerosity, commonality, typicality.[3] Rally firms, collect uniform evidence, class counsel experienced in tech.[1] Viable if patterned.
